AdminConversationPolicy.description: Compatibility fallback. New CMS clients must send conversationId.

idempotencyKey.description: Internal idempotency fingerprint returned by the current service.

providerReportedUsageRecords.description: Records measured in provider billing units without a per-request currency cost.

sensitive.description: Non-client-visible attributes are redacted by default.

_count.description: Present only when the membership grants project.settings.read.

assistantName.description: Present only when the membership grants project.settings.read.

createdAt.description: Present only when the membership grants project.settings.read.

defaultLocale.description: Present only when the membership grants project.knowledge.read, project.knowledge.write or project.settings.read.

organization.description: Present only when the membership grants project.settings.read.

organizationId.description: Present only when the membership grants project.settings.read.

publicKey.description: Present only when the membership grants project.settings.read.

serverKeyPrefix.description: Present only when the membership grants project.settings.read.

settings.description: Present only when the membership grants project.settings.read.

supportedLocales.description: Present only when the membership grants project.speech.read, project.knowledge.read, project.knowledge.write or project.settings.read.

systemPrompt.description: Present only when the membership grants project.settings.read.

updatedAt.description: Present only when the membership grants project.settings.read.

version.description: Present only when the membership grants project.settings.read.

voiceInstructions.description: Present only when the membership grants project.settings.read.

auditReason.description: Required when AI authority is enabled or broadened.

countsAsActivity.description: Whether a valid frontend occurrence extends Visit and Activity Day.

attributes.description: Complete user attribute snapshot validated against the current project schema. Omit to preserve stored attributes.

profileSnapshot.description: Atomic End User Attribute Snapshot. Validation failure never blocks Session creation.

botToken.description: Write-only Telegram bot token. It is validated and never returned.

settings.description: General project settings. Text-to-Speech settings are managed by the dedicated speech-synthesis endpoint.

voiceInstructions.description: Project-wide instructions for voice tone, pacing, emotion, and delivery.

version.description: Required only when reactivating a previously removed membership

webhookUrl.description: Write-only Slack Incoming Webhook URL. It is never returned.

handler.description: Legacy CMS field. Kept temporarily for backward compatibility and never used as the modal registry key.

modalName.description: Required for MODAL. Stable key passed to the host modal registry.

route.description: Required for PAGE. Product route passed to the host router.

schemaRevisionUnchanged.description: Metadata never creates a schema revision.
Policy never creates a schema revision.

minimumProfileVersion.description: Reject before EventLog write unless the End User has at least this profileVersion.

credentialFingerprint.description: Non-secret keyed fingerprint; never a webhook fragment.

audience.description: Separate typed Audience state tree; never interpreted as behavioral Eligibility.

scope.description: A Project-owned Event used as the deterministic preview anchor.

voiceInstructions.description: Project-wide instructions for voice tone, pacing, emotion, and delivery.

languageOverride.description: ISO 639-1 language override. Null enables automatic language detection.

confirmBreakingChange.description: Required after every blocking consumer has been migrated, republished, drained, or cancelled.

producerMigrationConfirmed.description: Required for producer-breaking changes after the producer rollout is complete.

catalogRevision.description: Condition catalog revision used to validate the draft.

expectedCurrentRevisionId.description: Scenario head observed by the editor; null publishes the first revision.

expectedDraftVersion.description: Durable draft version to publish atomically. When present, Rule, Audience, Delivery and graph are read from that draft.

profileFreshness.description: Required when Audience or action templates read End User Attributes.

rule.description: Versioned typed rule AST to compile into the immutable Scenario Revision.

triggerMatchingMode.description: AUTO follows stable compatible Event revisions; EXACT intentionally pins this Scenario revision.

expectedCurrentRevisionId.description: Scenario head observed by the editor.

serverApiKey.description: Shown once; replaces the previous server key.

expectedDraftVersion.description: Required when replacing an existing draft.

payloadSchema.description: JSON Schema for the event payload.

localization.description: Pinned locale selection and localized-value fallback evidence.

message.example: Event field or operator is unavailable

conversationId.description: Exact OPEN Conversation selected by the operator. Required for CMS vNext.

conversationPolicy.description: Compatibility fallback. New CMS clients must send conversationId.

interactionSessionId.description: Optional preferred online session. If omitted, backend selects the most recently active session.

duplicate.description: True when the same Idempotency-Key was already processed.

configured.description: Whether the server-side provider credential is configured.

interactionSessionId.description: Optional preferred online interaction session. Backend selects the latest active one when omitted.

text.description: Exact first phrase that Lola will synthesize after the user accepts the call.

handler.description: Legacy CMS value. Runtime commands never use this field.

modalName.description: MODAL key passed to the product modal registry.

route.description: PAGE route passed to the product router.
